title: Vanilla+
description: Just a collection of vanilla plus, quality of life mods, and texture packs to improve your solo or multiplayer Minecraft experience!
body:
Just a collection of vanilla plus, quality of life mods, and texture packs to improve your solo or multiplayer Minecraft experience!

Aiming to improve and match the vanilla feel of the announced Vibrant Visuals.

Hand-picked mods, shaders, and texture packs that I personally like to play with to improve my gameplay and optimize the game, along with fun and beautiful aesthetic additions.

This modpack adds visual improvement mods, such as Miniature shaderpack, Sodium, Better Clouds, and Particular, that all come together to make your vanilla Minecraft world beautiful and optimized. Along with resource packs that improve the vanilla textures and animation styles of items, mobs, and the player itself. Paired with the Essential mod, so you can play with your friends at any time.

Made specifically for Fabric Loader in the 1.21.8 version, but with the intention of continuing to follow the latest current version of Minecraft.

You're more than welcome to add your favorite texture packs or preferred shaders.
